subject: Exporting particle stack files to cisTEM
body:
Hi,
I am working on exporting picked particles to cisTEM. cisTEM is looking for 
a STAR file, and a one particle stack file. From what I can tell, WARP 
creates the STAR file, but creates a particle stack file for each 
individual micrograph (.mrcs). Is it possible to export a single particle 
stack file?
Many thanks!
-Chris
